parameters.query:
INSERT INTO auxiliary.funcionarios (
  id_funcionario, nome, cpf, data_admissao, data_demissao,
  cargo, salario, status_funcionario, created_at, updated_at
) VALUES (
  $1, $2, $3, $4::date, $5::date,
  $6, $7::numeric, $8,
  (NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo')::timestamp,
  (NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo')::timestamp
)
ON CONFLICT (id_funcionario) 
DO UPDATE SET 
  nome = EXCLUDED.nome,
  cpf = EXCLUDED.cpf,
  data_admissao = EXCLUDED.data_admissao,
  data_demissao = EXCLUDED.data_demissao,
  cargo = EXCLUDED.cargo,
  salario = EXCLUDED.salario,
  status_funcionario = EXCLUDED.status_funcionario,
  updated_at = (NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo')::timestamp
WHERE 
  funcionarios.nome IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED.nome
  OR funcionarios.cpf IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED.cpf
  OR funcionarios.data_admissao IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED.data_admissao
  OR funcionarios.data_demissao IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED.data_demissao
  OR funcionarios.cargo IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED.cargo
  OR funcionarios.salario IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED.salario
  OR funcionarios.status_funcionario IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED.status_funcionario
RETURNING id_funcionario, nome, status_funcionario;
